response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of polyglot full-stack experience with strong software craftsmanship credentials (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and exposure to high-throughput systems at Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or statistical analysis — the core focus of this Principal-level Growth role. Title progression (Senior/Staff) and scope of cross-org platform leadership fall short of IC6/Principal expectations for owning multi-team growth infrastructure.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background (TS/Node, D, C/C++, Java) with production scale experience
Strong testing/craftsmanship discipline — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, authored test frameworks
Exposure to high-throughput data systems (Sociomantic micro-services handling millions of req/s)
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or metrics-platform experience
Career level reads as Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/IC6 with multi-team platform ownership
Limited evidence of statistical analysis, guardrail design, or growth-engineering outcomes

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and polyglot production experience
